short_desc: Beliel, the Greater General of Abysm [The Specters Clan]
long_desc: Beliel, the Greater General of Abysm &W[&RT&rh&Re &rS&Rp&re&Rc&rt&Re&rr&Rs &rC&Rl&ra&Rn&W]&n
detailed_desc:
It is impossible to get a solid glance at the archangel.  He is nothing
that is human, and with a mere whisper, he dispels every image that you
attempt to create in your mind.
